basic_details.job_title: CDAC Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Project Engineer, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Thiruvananthapuram (A Scientific Society under MeitY, Govt. of India)
basic_details.post_name: Project Manager (PM), Senior Project Engineer (SPE), Project Engineer - Experienced (PE-Exp), Project Engineer - Fresher (PE-Fresher), Project Associate - Fresher (PA-Fresher)
basic_details.short_information: The Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Thiruvananthapuram has officially announced the Project Staff Recruitment 2026 with 60 openings across multiple posts. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at cdac.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria (varying by post: 30-56 years) and hold the required educational qualifications for respective posts (B.E./B.Tech or PG in relevant domains) can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 26 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below

important_dates.interview_date: June 2026 (exact schedule to be communicated to eligible candidates)

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram Project Staff Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official website www.cdac.in for any updates regarding fee. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the walk-in/online interview.

age_limit.age_details: Purely on Contract Basis at Consolidated Remuneration
age_limit.details: Maximum age limits vary by post as given in the notification above and are calculated as on the date of application submission. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-Servicemen candidates as per Government of India rules. Government employees on regular pay scale are eligible for 5 years age relaxation (in addition to other applicable relaxations). EWS certificate must be in the DOPT prescribed format available at www.persmin.nic.in. PWD candidates must have a minimum of 40% (permanent) disability to avail reservation/age relaxation benefits.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the educational qualification and experience requirements for the respective post. All qualifications must be from AICTE/UGC approved colleges/institutions or recognized universities. If a university/institution follows CGPA/DGPA/OGPA or letter grade evaluation, candidates must submit percentage conversion proof and grade certificate issued by the university/institution. Candidates in their final semester who will complete the course before joining may apply for Fresher posts; joining will be subject to passing with minimum required marks. | Post-wise Educational Qualification and Experience

vacancy_details.Post: Project Engineer - Experienced (SOC Analyst - SIEM Monitoring & Threat Analysis)

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: IT system integration project management; large-scale IT and call center project expertise; knowledge of emergency response operations, CAD systems, telephony, GIS integration; IT infrastructure, networking, databases; workforce management, SLA/KPI monitoring; regulatory compliance, data privacy and security standards
vacancy_details.Work Profile: End-to-end planning, execution and management of emergency response call center operations; integration of CAD, ACD/IVR, CRM, GIS and telephony systems; coordination with government stakeholders, vendors and emergency services; monitoring SLAs/KPIs; managing teams and resources

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Data center solutions; installing, configuring and maintaining servers; Windows/Linux/UNIX OS expertise; performance monitoring, patch management, user access management; backup and disaster recovery; server security practices; documentation and collaboration
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Installing, configuring and maintaining servers hosting critical call center and dispatch applications; ensuring high availability, reliability and security; monitoring system performance; applying patches; managing storage; implementing backup/disaster recovery; troubleshooting hardware, software and network issues

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Network, application and data security expertise; firewall, IDS/IPS, VPN, endpoint protection; vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, threat analysis, incident response; ISO 27001, NIST, GDPR or HIPAA compliance frameworks; security monitoring, risk management, encryption and access controls
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Protecting applications and data from security threats and vulnerabilities; implementing and managing firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPN, and endpoint protection; risk assessment, vulnerability testing, incident response; ensuring data privacy and regulatory compliance; establishing security policies; monitoring for potential breaches; maintaining 24/7 secure emergency response environment

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Backend and Java ecosystem (Java, Spring, Spring Boot, Hibernate/JPA, Maven, Git, RESTful web services, microservices); OR Frontend and web technologies (HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Node.js, PHP, React, jQuery, GIS libraries); OR Databases (PostgreSQL, PostGIS, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Cassandra); OR Networking (Data center/Corporate/Campus network management, BGP/VLAN/VPN/IPv6, CCNA/CCNP); OR AI/Data Science (AI, ML, Deep Learning, image/video analysis, TensorFlow, Keras, CUDA DNN, MATLAB); OR Other skills (Apache Kafka, Agile, Cloud-based development, RDBMS/NoSQL)
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Project management for ERSS and allied projects

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: IT sector experience as database admin; relational, NoSQL and cloud database expertise; SQL and scripting for automation; database design, performance optimization, backup and recovery; OS, networking and security; high availability, replication and compliance standards
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Design, manage and maintain mission-critical databases supporting call handling, dispatch and reporting; ensure high availability, data integrity and security; implement backup, recovery and disaster recovery strategies; performance monitoring, query optimization, user access management; support integration with CAD, GIS, telephony and call center systems

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Contact Centre implementation experience; ACD, IVR, CTI, CRM and workforce management tools; omnichannel communication platforms (voice, chat, email, video); call flow design and backend integration; performance monitoring, reporting and analytics
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Design, implement and manage call center technologies for efficient management of emergency calls; integrate ACD, IVR, CTI, CRM, omnichannel platforms with CAD, GIS and telephony; monitor performance, optimize workflows, ensure SLA and quality standards compliance; provide technical guidance to improve customer and responder experience

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Contact Centre Computer Aided Dispatch (CAD) application experience; implementing, configuring and managing CAD systems in emergency response/dispatch environments; call intake, incident management and dispatch workflow knowledge; integration of CAD with GIS, telephony and radio communication; system monitoring, troubleshooting, high availability assurance
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Implement, configure and maintain CAD systems managing emergency call intake, incident logging and real-time dispatch of resources; integrate CAD with telephony, GIS, radio communication and mobile data systems; monitor system performance; troubleshoot; ensure data accuracy; train users on system functionality; maintain 24/7 uninterrupted emergency operations

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Network design/solution experience; LAN, WAN, WLAN and VPN environments; routers, switches, firewalls and load balancers; network protocols, IP addressing and routing; performance monitoring; access control and intrusion prevention; high availability and disaster recovery; cloud networking, SDN and network automation tools
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Design, configure and maintain network infrastructure supporting critical emergency communication and call center operations; manage LAN, WAN, VPN and wireless networks; ensure high availability, security and performance of connectivity between call center applications, CAD, GIS, telephony and field units; monitor network status; implement security controls; ensure 24/7 uninterrupted services

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Backend and Java ecosystem; OR Frontend and web technologies (GIS libraries: Leaflet, OpenLayers, React-Leaflet; GeoServer, PostGIS); OR Databases (PostgreSQL, PostGIS, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Cassandra); OR AI/Data Science (AI, ML, Deep Learning, TensorFlow, Keras, CUDA DNN, MATLAB); OR Networking (data center/corporate/campus network management, CCNA/CCNP); OR Hardware design and development (digital/analog circuit design for IoT, PCB design, circuit simulation tools)

Strong experience in Application Security/VAPT; Burp Suite, Snyk, Nessus or equivalent tools; OWASP Top 10 and OWASP ASVS knowledge; web application architecture; Java, Node.js or similar backend technologies; CEH, GWAPT, OSCP or equivalent certifications (desirable)
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Manual and automated application security testing for web/mobile applications; SAST, DAST and SCA activities; threat modeling; identifying and tracking application security vulnerabilities with remediation guidance; preparing security assessment reports; communicating findings to development teams; collaborating during vulnerability remediation

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Backend and Java ecosystem; OR Frontend and web technologies with GIS libraries; OR Databases; OR AI/Data Science; OR Networking; OR Hardware design and development (digital/analog circuit design for IoT, PCB design)
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Development activities in the relevant domain

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Application Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT); Burp Suite, Snyk, Nessus or equivalent; OWASP Top 10 and OWASP ASVS; web application architecture; Java, Node.js or similar backend; CEH, GWAPT, OSCP or equivalent (desirable)
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Manual and automated application security testing (web/mobile); SAST, DAST and SCA; threat modeling; vulnerability identification and remediation tracking; security assessment reports; collaboration with development teams

vacancy_details.Post / Post Code: PE-Exp - SOC Analyst / SIEM Monitoring & Threat Analysis (CDACT/PET/03)
vacancy_details.Desired Skills: SOC, SIEM Monitoring, Threat Analysis, Log Management and Security Incident Handling; Wazuh, Splunk, ELK Stack, IBM QRadar, ArcSight or equivalent SIEM tools; log analysis from Windows/Linux servers, network devices, firewalls, IDS/IPS, EDR, web and database servers; security event correlation, alert triage, threat detection, incident investigation; scripting (Shell/Python) for automation and log analysis; CEH, CSA, CompTIA Security+, ISO 27001 or equivalent (desirable)
vacancy_details.Work Profile: SOC Operations - Monitor and analyze security alerts/events from SIEM platforms; configure and maintain SIEM tools; continuous security event monitoring and log analysis; develop, tune and optimize SIEM correlation rules; conduct threat analysis; proactive log review and threat hunting (IoCs); integrate threat intelligence feeds; support incident response; generate daily/weekly/monthly security monitoring and incident reports

vacancy_details.Desired Skills: Networking concepts; hardware and software installation; call centre support operations; database; virtual machines; Linux operating systems
vacancy_details.Work Profile: Technical support at Emergency Response Support System (ERSS Dial 112) 24/7 call centre operations

selection_process: Stage 1 Registration via Google Form Mandatory; only registered candidates will be called for interview
Stage 2 Initial Screening of Applications Based on academic records and eligibility declared in application
Stage 3 Walk-in / Online Interview Schedule will be communicated to eligible candidates via registered email; No TA/DA paid
Stage 4 Certificate Verification Selected candidates will be informed via registered email; originals with one set of self-attested photocopies required
Stage 5 Provisional Offer Letter Initially only provisional offer letter issued; final offer letter issued after certificate/document verification clearance
The selection process for C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram Project Staff Recruitment 2026 consists of initial screening of educational records and online application/form

followed by a Walk-in/Online Interview. Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the interview. Meeting the minimum eligibility criteria does not entitle any candidate to be called for the interview — C-DAC may limit the number of candidates called based on higher qualifications and experience over the minimum prescribed. Selection will be based on academic qualifications
and other parameters as decided by management.
how_to_apply: Candidates must register their candidature by filling the Google Form available on the official CDAC website below the respective post details, on or before 26-05-2026 by 17:00 hrs. Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the walk-in/online interview. After registering, candidates must download and fill the prescribed CDAC Application Form and One Page Write-Up (available on the website below the post details) and attach a latest passport size photograph. Hard copies of applications/documents are NOT to be sent to C-DAC; all communications will be via email only. The interview call letter and all correspondence will be sent to the email ID provided in the online application — no hard copy will be sent. All recruitment-related queries should be addressed to [email protected], clearly mentioning the post code and candidate name in the subject line.
For Walk-in Mode - Documents to be carried in original with one set of self-attested photocopies:
Duly filled Application Form
Duly filled One Page Write-Up (6 copies for walk-in candidates)
Valid Photo ID proof with date of birth (PAN card / Aadhaar card / Driving License etc.)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from parent organization — mandatory for candidates working in Central/State Govt./Autonomous Bodies/PSUs
For Online Mode - Documents to be emailed to [email protected] on or before last date of registration:
All documents listed above for walk-in mode (scanned copies)
Subject line of email must clearly mention Post Code and Name of Candidate
Documents to be submitted at Certificate Verification (selected candidates only, as intimated via registered email):
Valid Photo ID proof with date of birth (PAN card / Aadhaar / Driving License etc.)
10th, 12th, and BE/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc/ME/M.Tech certificates and consolidated mark sheets (as applicable)
Experience certificates for the period claimed, clearly mentioning duration of employment, salary received and designation
Employment certificate/NOC or any other valid certificate from current employer (as experience proof)
Caste certificate for SC/ST; Non-Creamy Layer certificate for OBC (in prescribed DOPT format)
Medical certificate (in case of PWD — disability certificate in format prescribed by DOPT OM No. 36035/3/2004-Estt. dated 29/12/2005 as amended; minimum 40% permanent disability)
EWS Income and Property Certificate in prescribed DOPT format (for EWS candidates; OM No. 36039/1/2019-Estt. dated 31.01.2019 as amended)
CGPA/percentage conversion certificate from university/institution (if CGPA/letter grade system followed)
Equivalence certificate from appropriate authority (if equivalence clause is claimed)
Apply / Register at: https://www.cdac.in | Email for Online Mode / Queries: [email protected]
important_instructions: Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the walk-in/online interview — registration via Google Form is mandatory. Candidates must read the full notification and General Terms & Conditions carefully before registering. All qualifications must be from AICTE/UGC approved institutions or recognized universities. Academic/teaching/research work, non-profit organization experience, internships/project work as part of academic curriculum, part-time, daily wage, or visiting/guest faculty experience will NOT be counted as valid experience. Experience will be counted only if supported by proper experience certificate from previous/current employers clearly mentioning duration, salary and designation. C-DAC's decision on experience is final; work experience claimed without supporting documents will not be considered. Salary mentioned is the starting minimum for the given experience range; candidates with more experience will receive additional increment as per C-DAC policy. C-DAC internal candidates must have completed at least 2 years of service at C-DAC as on the notification date to be eligible. Posts are purely on contract basis — no claim or right to regular/permanent appointment at C-DAC will be entertained. Selected candidates may be deployed/transferred to any project location anywhere in India as per organizational requirement. Government/PSU/Autonomous Body employees must produce NOC/Employment Certificate at the time of interview. C-DAC has not authorized any agent/agency for recruitment activities; candidates should not engage with any such entities. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the walk-in/online interview. Any attempt to promote candidature by any means will be treated as disqualification for selection. Internal candidates finally selected will have to resign from current C-DAC service and join the selected post as a new employee. Candidates are advised to visit www.cdac.in regularly for notices, corrigenda, and updates — no individual communication will be made. C-DAC reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of posts, not fill any post, or cancel/restrict/extend the recruitment process at any time without prior notice.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in C-DAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram has announced 60 vacancies for various Project Staff posts including Project Manager, Senior Project Engineer, Project Engineer, and Project Associate.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for C-DAC Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The registration starts on 13 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 26 May 2026 (5:00 PM). Interviews are expected to be conducted in June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for C-DAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply through an online Google Form available on the official C-DAC website. Only registered candidates can attend the interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for C-DAC Project Staff 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening followed by a walk-in or online interview. Final selection is based on qualifications, experience, and interview performance.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for C-DAC Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary ranges from ₹25,000 to ₹1,10,000 depending on the post. Project Managers receive the highest pay, while fresher roles start at ₹25,000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for C-DAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.E./B.Tech/MCA or relevant postgraduate degree in disciplines like Computer Science, IT, Electronics, etc., from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for C-DAC Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Are C-DAC Project Staff jobs permanent?
faq.answer: No, these positions are purely contractual for an initial period of 3 years or project duration, and may be extended based on performance.
